title: Bring Removed Recipes Back
description: Adds the recipes that have been added and then removed at some point in Minecraft's history
body:
[![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/ ) [![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_vector.svg)](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/client/) [![quilted-fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

### THIS IS A WORK IN PROGRESS

The entire point of this mod is to bring back all of the recipes that Mojang has added to Minecraft back to the game.

Eventually I will add functionality to the Nether Reactor Core. Here's a link to the [Trello board](https://trello.com/b/QRAu1xrC/deleted-recipes) with all of the features I want to add for the final release.

### The Current Release has a non-functional Nether Reactor Core
